_comment: Reference template documenting the env-var contract for the servers wired in the committed .mcp.json. The real .mcp.json uses ${ENV} references — NEVER literal tokens. Required env vars: CONTEXT7_API_KEY (Context7), GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN (read-only GitHub). Serena and platform-governor need no key. NEVER point an MCP at production Keycloak/Postgres/Sentry or a live customer tenant.
_security: Secrets resolve from environment at launch via ${VAR} — not stored in any committed file.
GitHub uses the official github-mcp-server with --read-only (no write/PR-create).
Context7 = network doc-fetch (read-only); Serena + platform-governor are fully local.
Contributors without a given key see that network server fail gracefully; local servers still work.

platform-governor._status: Active (local, no key). Repo-native governance tools.

serena._status: Active (local, no key). Install: uvx pulls oraios/serena on first run.

github._status: Active (read-only). Build once: go install github.com/github/github-mcp-server/cmd/github-mcp-server@latest. Needs GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in env.
